description_for_human: Measured ground subsidence/uplift (mm/yr) for any US address, from NASA OPERA satellite InSAR.
description_for_model: Returns MEASURED vertical ground motion (mm/yr and in/yr) per US address from NASA OPERA Sentinel-1 InSAR. Flat $0.40 per covered report; misses free; agents can self-register (POST /api/v1/autonomous/register) and self-cap spend. Use /api/v1/schema for enums and /llms.txt for full docs. Negative = sinking.
